message:
chore(deps): migrate asupersync from git source to crates.io v0.2.0

Replaces the git-based asupersync and asupersync-macros dependencies
with version = "0.2.0" from crates.io. Also updates the [patch] sections:
removes the now-unnecessary crates-io patch for asupersync (since we're
pulling from the registry directly), and switches the fastmcp_rust and
fastapi_rust patch overrides from git references to local path references
for development builds. This simplifies dependency resolution and removes
the build-time git fetch requirement for asupersync.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
